verses.text: Amaute in kei tungah, “ Topa' inn-ah pai ni,” hong cih uh ciangin kei ka kipak hi
Jerusalem aw, na kulhkongpi sungah kote hong tungin ka ding khinta uh hi

Jerusalem khuapi pen Israel-te tungah thu a kipiaksa bangin Topa' tungah lungdamna a ko dingin Topa' minamte, Israel minamte, a hong paitohna, khuapi lian tawh a kibangin a kibawl, kiptakin a kilam bikbek khuapi ahi hi
David' innkuante' kumpi tokhom, thukhenna ding kumpi tokhomte, tua lai-ah kikoih hi
Jerusalem khuapi, a nopsakna ding thu ngen un la, “Nang hong itte a dau pai ta hen
Na khuasungah lungnopna om hen la, na galvilna tausangte' huam sungah lungmuan'na om ta hen,” ci-in ngen un
Sanggamte leh kikholhpihte ka khualna-in, “Jerusalem in nopna om ta hen,” ka ci ding hi
Topa eite' Pasian' inn ka khualna-in nangma hoihna ding thu ka ngen ding hi.
